summary: Comprehensive testing of BLUE BAY Fleet Management app - All major features working correctly. Backend 100% pass rate (23/23 tests), Frontend 95% pass rate. Leaflet+OpenStreetMap migration complete for main map pages.

code_quality.issue: Still imports Google Maps MapComponent - should be migrated to Leaflet for consistency
code_quality.note: Map only renders when GPS is active, so impact is minimal. Main map pages (Route Planning, Live Tracking) are fully migrated to Leaflet.

passed_tests: Get vehicles returns 3 vehicles with Kerala registration
Dashboard analytics returns correct counts (27 shops, 3 vehicles, 3 warehouses)
No Google Maps API in frontend HTML
Admin Dashboard displays correct stats (Total Shops: 27, Active Vehicles: 3/3, Warehouses: 3)
Business Directory page loads with 27 businesses
Business Directory search and district filter works
Route Planning page with Leaflet map loads correctly
Store markers (27) visible and clickable on Route Planning map
Store selection works - markers change color when selected
Route preview with polyline works (shows distance calculation)
Sequence numbers appear on selected stores
Live Tracking page with Leaflet map loads correctly
Live Tracking shows 3 vehicles with status indicators
Analytics page loads with charts (Weekly Sales Trend, Payment Mode Distribution, Route Status Overview)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Migrate DriverDashboard.js MapComponent from Google Maps to Leaflet for full consistency (low priority - only shows when GPS active)
critical_code_review_comments: MapComponent.js still uses @vis.gl/react-google-maps - consider removing this file if not needed
DriverDashboard.js imports MapComponent which uses Google Maps - should be migrated to Leaflet for consistency
context_for_next_testing_agent: All main features tested and working. Leaflet+OpenStreetMap migration complete for Route Planning and Live Tracking pages. DriverDashboard still uses Google Maps MapComponent but only renders when GPS is active. PWA manifest and service worker are in place.

google_maps_removed.driver_dashboard: PARTIAL - still uses Google Maps MapComponent (low impact)
